disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden onset a few hours ago of a fast, irregular, fluttering/skipping heartbeat that has not settled
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe what your heartbeat feels like?
When did the racing heart start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on out of nowhere about four hours ago — it's fast and all over the place, like it's fluttering and skipping, and it hasn't stopped.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Shortness of breath at rest and on minimal exertion (breathless walking to the front door)
trigger_question_examples: Are you short of breath right now?
What happens when you walk around?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — I'm puffed even sitting here, and walking to the front door left me really breathless.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chest fullness accompanying the palpitations, without classic crushing or radiating exertional pain
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any chest pain or tightness?
Does it hurt or just feel full?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's more a fullness in my chest than a pain — it isn't crushing and it doesn't spread to my arm or jaw, it just feels full with the fluttering.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Twelve months of progressive profound fatigue and low energy
trigger_question_examples: How has your energy been over recent months?
Have you been feeling tired or drained?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been absolutely drained for about a year now — no energy at all, more than I can put down to getting older.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chronic aching and stiffness of the 2nd and 3rd knuckles (MCP joints) of both hands
trigger_question_examples: Which joints ache, and for how long?
Can you point to where the aching is?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's mainly the big knuckles of my first two fingers on each hand — they've ached and felt stiff for months.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently diagnosed diabetes now on metformin and long-acting insulin
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions?
What medications are you on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I was only recently told I've got diabetes — I've just started metformin tablets and a long-acting insulin.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Skin has taken on a slate-grey / bronze discolouration over the past year, most noticeable on sun-exposed areas
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in your skin colour?
Does your skin look different to you lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, my skin has gone a sort of grey-bronze colour this past year, especially on my arms and face.

trigger_question_examples: Any tummy pain or discomfort?
Do you get any ache under your ribs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a dull ache under my right ribs — not sharp, just there in the background.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Loss of libido over the past year
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in your sex drive?
Any changes in that area of your health over the past year?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Since you ask — yes, I've completely gone off sex this past year, which isn't like me.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'd rather not get into that, it's probably just the stress.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone and is anxious about collapsing unobserved if the fast heartbeat continues
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone with you at home right now?
Who is around to help you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm on my own here — that's part of why I'm worried, if I passed out no one would know.
